class.name: PDFPage
class.description: Path Painting - A path is composed of straight and curved line segments. Paths define shapes and regions. Vector graphics are drawn by the following steps: - Set graphics states (such as line-width, dash-pattern, color...) using "Graphics State Operators" or "Color Operators". - Start new path using path_move_to(), path_rectangle(), path_arc(), or path_circle(). - Append to path using "Path Construction Operators". - Stroke or paint the path using "Path Painting Operators". Text Showing - Text is drawn by the following steps: - Start drawing text by invoking begin_text(). - Set text states (such as font, filling-color...) using "Text State Operators" or "Color Operators". At least set_font_and_size() must be invoked once before invoking "Text Showing Operators". - Set text positioning by invoking "Text Positioning Operators". - Show text by invoking "Text Showing Operators". - Repeat steps 2 to 4 if necessary. - Finish drawing text by invoking end_text().

method.name: annotation_link_create
method.description: Creates a new link annotation object for the page. Error code - EC_INVALID_PAGE - An invalid page handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_ENCODER - An invalid encoder handle is specified..

method.name: annotation_text_create
method.description: Creates a new text annotation object for the page. Error code - EC_INVALID_PAGE - An invalid page handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_ENCODER - An invalid encoder handle is specified..

method.name: annotation_uri_link_create
method.description: Creates a new web link annotation object for the page. Error code - EC_INVALID_PAGE - An invalid page handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed.

method.name: begin_text
method.description: Begins a text object and sets the text position to (0, 0). Graphics Mode - Before - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION. - After - GRAPHICS_MODE_TEXT_OBJECT.

method.name: clip
method.description: Modifies the current clipping path by intersecting it with the current path using the nonzero winding number rule. The clipping path is only modified after the succeeding painting operator. To avoid painting the current path, use the function path_end(). Following painting operations will only affect the regions of the page contained by the clipping path. Initially, the clipping path includes the entire page. There is no way to enlarge the current clipping path, or to replace the clipping path with a new one. The functions HPDF_Page_GSave() and HPDF_Page_GRestore() may be used to save and restore the current graphics state, including the clipping path. Graphics Mode - Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT.

method.name: concat
create_destination
method.description: Creates a new destination object for the page. Error codes - EC_INVALID_PAGE - An invalid page handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed.

method.name: current_font_get
method.description: Gets the handle of the page's current font.

method.name: current_font_size_get
method.description: Gets the size of the page's current font.

method.name: current_pos_get
method.description: Gets the current position for path painting. An application can invoke this only when graphics mode is GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT.

method.name: current_text_pos_get
method.description: Gets the current position for text showing. An application can invoke this only when graphics mode is GRAPHICS_MODE_TEXT_OBJECT.

method.name: dash_get
method.description: Gets the current pattern of the page.

method.name: draw_image
method.description: Shows an image in one operation. Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT.

method.name: draw_text_out
method.description: Prints the text on the specified position. Graphic Mode - Before: GRAPHICS_MODE_TEXT_OBJECT.

method.name: draw_text_rect
method.description: Prints the text inside the specified region. Graphic Mode - Before: GRAPHICS_MODE_TEXT_OBJECT.

method.name: end_text
method.description: Ends a text object. Graphic Mode - Before: GRAPHICS_MODE_TEXT_OBJECT. - After: GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION.

method.name: eo_clip
method.description: Modifies the current clipping path by intersecting it with the current path using the even-odd rule. The clipping path is only modified after the succeeding painting operator. To avoid painting the current path, use the function page.end_path(). Following painting operations will only affect the regions of the page contained by the clipping path. Initially, the clipping path includes the entire page. There is no way to enlarge the current clipping path, or to replace the clipping path with a new one. The functions g_save() and g_restore() may be used to save and restore the current graphics state, including the clipping path. Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT.

method.name: execute_x_object
method.description: Draws the XObject using the current graphics context. This is used by draw_image() to draw the PDFImage by first calling g_save() and concat() and then calling g_estore() after execute_x_object(). It could be used manually to rotate an image. Graphics Mode - Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION

method.name: ext_g_state_set
method.description: Applyies the graphics state to the page. Graphics Mode - Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION.

method.name: filling_color_space_get
method.description: Returns the current value of the page's filling color space.

method.name: g_mode_get
method.description: Gets the current graphics mode, or 0.

method.name: g_restore
method.description: Restore the graphics state which is saved by g_save().

method.name: g_save
method.description: Saves the page's current graphics parameter to the stack. An application can invoke g_save() up to 28 (???) and can restore the saved parameter by invoking g_restore(). The parameters that are saved by g_save() are: Character Spacing, Clipping Path, Dash Mode, Filling Color, Flatness, Font, Font Size, Horizontal Scalling, Line Width, Line Cap Style, Line Join Style, Miter Limit, Rendering Mode, Stroking Color, Text Leading, Text Rise, Transformation Matrix, Word Spacing Graphics Mode - Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION.

method.name: g_state_depth_get
method.description: Returns the number of the page's graphics state stack.

method.name: get_status
method.description: The last returned status.

method.name: measure_text
method.description: Returns the byte length which can be included within the specified width as x, and the real widths of the text as y. - text - The text to get width. - width - The width of the area to put the text. - wordwrap - When there are three words of "ABCDE", "FGH", and "IJKL", and the substring until "J" can be included within the width, if word_wrap parameter is HPDF_FALSE it returns 12, and if word_wrap parameter is HPDF_TRUE, it returns 10 (the end of the previous word).

method.name: move_text_pos
method.description: Changes the current text position, using the specified offset values. If the current text position is (x1, y1), the new text position will be (x1 + x, y1 + y). Graphics Mode - Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_TEXT_OBJECT.

method.name: move_text_pos_2
method.description: Changes the current text position, using the specified offset values. If the current text position is (x1, y1), the new text position will be (x1 + x, y1 + y). Also, the text-leading is set to -y. Graphics Mode - Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_TEXT_OBJECT.

method.name: move_to_next_line
method.description: Moves current position for the text showing depending on current text showing point and text leading. The new position is calculated with current text transition matrix.

method.name: path_arc
method.description: Appends a circle arc to the current path. Angles are given in degrees, with 0 degrees being vertical, upward, from the (x,y) position. - ang1 - The angle of the begining of the arc. - ang2 - The angle of the end of the arc. It must be greater than ang1. Graphics Mode - Before - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION or GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT. - After - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT.

method.name: path_circle
method.description: Appends a circle to the current path. Graphics Mode - Before - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION or GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT. - After - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT.

method.name: path_close
method.description: Appends a straight line from the current point to the start point of sub path. The current point is moved to the start point of sub path. Graphics Mode - Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT.

method.name: path_curve_to
method.description: Appends a Bézier curve to the current path using the control points (x1, y1) and (x2, y2) and (x3, y3), then sets the current point to (x3, y3). Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT.

method.name: path_curve_to_2
method.description: Appends a Bézier curve to the current path using the current point and (x2, y2) and (x3, y3) as control points. Then, the current point is set to (x3, y3). Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT.

method.name: path_curve_to_3
method.description: Appends a Bézier curve to the current path using two spesified points. The point (x1, y1) and the point (x3, y3) are used as the control points for a Bézier curve and current point is moved to the point (x3, y3). Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT.

method.name: path_end
method.description: Ends the path object without filling or painting. Graphics Mode - Before - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT. - After - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION.

method.name: path_eo_fill
method.description: Fills the current path using the even-odd rule. Graphics Mode - Before - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT. - After - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION.

method.name: path_eo_fill_stroke
method.description: Fills the current path using the even-odd rule, then paints the path. Graphics Mode - Before - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT. - After - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION.

method.name: path_eo_fill_stroke_close
method.description: closes the current path, fills the current path using the even-odd rule, then paints the path. Graphics Mode - Before - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT. - After - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION.

method.name: path_fill_stroke
method.description: Fills the current path using the nonzero winding number rule, then paints the path. Graphics Mode - Before - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT. - After - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION.

method.name: path_fill_stroke_close
method.description: Closes the current path, fills the current path using the nonzero winding number rule, then paints the path. Graphics Mode - Before - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT. - After - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION.

method.name: path_line_to
method.description: Appends a path from the current point to the specified point. Graphics Mode - Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT.

method.name: path_move_to
method.description: Starts a new subpath and move the current point for drawing path, it sets the start point for the path to the point (x, y). Graphics Mode - Before - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION or HPDF_GMODE_PATH_OBJECT. - After - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT.

method.name: path_rectangle
method.description: Appends a rectangle to the current path. Graphics Mode - Before - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION or HPDF_GMODE_PATH_OBJECT. - After - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT.

method.name: path_stroke
method.description: Paints the current path. Graphics Mode - Before - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT. - After - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION.

method.name: path_stroke_close
method.description: Closes the current path. Then, it paints the path. Graphics Mode - Before - GRAPHICS_MODE_PATH_OBJECT. - After - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION.

method.name: rotate_set
method.description: Sets rotation angle of the page. Error codes - EC_INVALID_PAGE - An invalid page handle was set. - EC_PAGE_INVALID_ROTATE_VALUE - An invalid rotation angle was set.

method.name: set_font_and_size
method.description: Sets the type of font and size leading. Graphics Mode - Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_PAGE_DESCRIPTION or GRAPHICS_MODE_TEXT_OBJECT.

method.name: show_text
method.description: Prints the text at the current position on the page. Graphics Mode - Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_TEXT_OBJECT.

method.name: show_text_next_line
method.description: Moves the current text position to the start of the next line, then prints the text at the current position on the page. Graphics Mode - Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_TEXT_OBJECT.

method.name: show_text_next_line_ex
method.description: Moves the current text position to the start of the next line; then sets word spacing and character spacing; finally prints the text at the current position on the page. Graphics Mode - Before and after - GRAPHICS_MODE_TEXT_OBJECT.

method.name: size_set
method.description: Changes the size and direction of a page to a predefined size. Error codes - EC_INVALID_PAGE - An invalid page handle was set. - EC_PAGE_INVALID_SIZE - An invalid size was set. - EC_PAGE_INVALID_DIRECTION - An invalid direction was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed.

method.name: slide_show_set
method.description: Configures the setting for slide transition of the page.

method.name: stroking_color_space_get
method.description: Returns the current value of the page's stroking color space.

method.name: text_width
method.description: Gets the width of the text in current fontsize, character spacing and word spacing.

method.name: trans_matrix_get
method.description: Gets the current transformation matrix of the page.

members.member: Gets the current value of the page's character spacing.
The current value of the page's filling color. Valid only when the page's filling color space is COLOR_SSPACE_DEVICE_CMYK. Assignment sets color space to COLOR_SSPACE_DEVICE_CMYK.
The current value of the page's stroking color. Valid only when the page's filling color space is COLOR_SSPACE_DEVICE_CMYK. Assignment sets color space to COLOR_SSPACE_DEVICE_CMYK.
Gets the current value of the page's flatness.
The current value of the page's filling color. Valid only when the page's filling color space is COLOR_SSPACE_DEVICE_GRAY. Assignment sets color space to COLOR_SSPACE_DEVICE_GRAY.
The current value of the page's stroking color. Valid only when the page's filling color space is COLOR_SSPACE_DEVICE_GRAY. Assignment sets color space to COLOR_SSPACE_DEVICE_GRAY.
The height of a page. Error codes - EC_INVALID_PAGE - An invalid page handle was set. - EC_PAGE_INVALID_SIZE - An invalid size was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed.
The current value of the page's horizontal scalling for text showing.
The current line cap style of the page.
The current line join style of the page.
The current line width of the page.
Gets the current value of the page's miter limit.
The current value of the page's filling color. Valid only when the page's filling color space is COLOR_SSPACE_DEVICE_RGB. Assignment sets color space to COLOR_SSPACE_DEVICE_RGB.
The current value of the page's stroking color. Valid only when the page's filling color space is COLOR_SSPACE_DEVICE_RGB. Assignment sets color space to COLOR_SSPACE_DEVICE_RGB.
The current value of the page's line spacing.
The current text transformation matrix of the page.
The current value of the page's text rendering mode.
The current value of the page's text rising.
The width of a page. Error codes - EC_INVALID_PAGE - An invalid page handle was set. - EC_PAGE_INVALID_SIZE - An invalid size was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed.
Returns the current value of the page's word spacing.

constants.constant: Set the longer value to vertical.
Set the longer value to horizontal.
The text is aligned to left.
The text is aligned to right.
The text is aligned to center.
Add spaces between the words to justify both left and right side.
